title: Cakeable Mobs
description: A mod that turns mobs into cake!
body:
# Cakeable Mobs
Don't you ever wish you had easier enemies to fight? Would you like a small snack after a big fight?
Your wishes have been granted with Cakeable Mobs!

Any mob you fight now turns into cake!

This mod was brought to you by [Infernal Studios](https://infernalstudios.org).
